title: Unique Path on Desktop
excerpt:
Currently, there’s no direct way to get a unique path to a board on the desktop version of monday.com. The URL is only available in the web version. 
How can we have a unique path to use when pasting to slack/communcatio…

posts.author: Daniel_Ellis (Daniel Ellis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, there’s no direct way to get a unique path to a board on the desktop version of monday.com. The URL is only available in the web version.

How can we have a unique path to use when pasting to slack/communcations tool + other boards/updates?

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Daniel,

I’m personally not a desktop app user, but try the solution from this thread to see if it still works:

How to find the Board/Item URL from the Desktop App Platform discussions
When I want to tell my team where to look for something in Monday, it’s cumbersome to write out XYZ Workspace > XYZ Folder > XYZ Board all the time. Is there an option to create and copy a URL for a board or a folder? Much the way you can share a folder in Google drive or box.com?
